utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with costs: 1) health_coverage includes insurer/product name, price (€100/month), scope (comprehensive, adventure activities), deductible (5%), territorial limits (Germany unlimited, international €500,000) and activity specifics. Costs are present. 2) property_coverage includes insurer/product name, price (€60/month), electronics/equipment limit (€3,000), deductible (10%), loss-of-use/temporary accommodation (€150/day up to 30 days), worldwide coverage for professional equipment. Costs are present. 3) travel_coverage includes product type/name, price (€80/month), coverage components (extreme sports, rescue, evacuation €1,000,000, equipment replacement €5,000, emergency return unlimited). Costs are present. 4) additional_services includes product name, price (€60/month), limits (€1,000,000 per claim, €2,000,000 annual), deductible (€500), legal defense, retroactive period, compliance note. Costs are present. 5) total_budget provides monthly and annual totals and compares to current spend, with a timeline. It includes a complete cost breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are included and fully specified with required details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item in the final coverage plan to the exact item names listed in the ground-truth ratings. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Health Insurance (maps to Primary Health Coverage -> physical_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan), InsurePlus Standard Property Insurance (maps to Property Protection -> home_content -> InsurePlus Standard Coverage), Adventure Travel Coverage (maps to Travel Enhancement Services -> Adventure Travel Coverage), InsurePlus Professional Liability (no corresponding item exists in the ground-truth ratings, so it cannot be mapped), and total_budget (not a policy). Travel coverage in the final plan is named 'Adventure Travel Coverage' which exists under travel_enhancement_services with a rating. Therefore, we map the three identifiable items.

final_package_text:

    "health_coverage": "LifeFirst Standard Health Insurance - €100/month, comprehensive health with adventure activities coverage, 5% deductible, unlimited coverage in Germany, €500,000 international coverage, includes glacier photography and high-altitude trekking activities",

    "total_budget": "Monthly cost: €305/month, Annual cost: €3,660/year, Budget increase: €120/month (€1,440/year) from current €185/month spending, 7-day implementation timeline ensures March 31st compliance deadline"
